001package net.okocraft.box.feature.category;
002
003import net.okocraft.box.feature.category.model.Category;
004import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;
005
006import java.util.ArrayList;
007import java.util.List;
008
009public final class CategoryHolder {
010
011    private static final @NotNull List<Category> CATEGORIES = new ArrayList<>();
012
013    public static @NotNull List<Category> get() {
014        return CATEGORIES;
015    }
016
017    static void addAll(@NotNull List<Category> categoryList) {
018        CATEGORIES.addAll(categoryList);
019    }
020}
